definitions.es: La capacidad de pensar, entender y aprender; inteligencia.
definitions.vi: Khả năng suy nghĩ, hiểu và học hỏi; trí thông minh.
definitions.en: The ability to think, understand, and learn; intelligence.

example.vi: Cô ấy có trí thông minh vượt trội.

content.sentence: Tôi cần nâng cao ___ của mình.

translation.en: I need to enhance my intellect.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He always tries to train his mind every day by reading books.
She believes that mind is very important in solving difficult problems.
I like games that help develop mind and creativity.
exampleSentences: Anh luôn cố gắng rèn luyện trí mỗi ngày bằng cách đọc sách.
Chị tin rằng trí rất quan trọng trong việc giải quyết vấn đề khó.
Em thích các trò chơi giúp phát triển trí và sự sáng tạo.
notes:
trí = mind, intellect — your ability to think, understand, remember, and reason.

It’s a noun and usually appears in set combinations rather than standing alone. Very common pairs: trí tuệ (intelligence), trí nhớ (memory), lý trí (reason, rational mind). It’s an abstract noun, so you don’t use classifiers with it.  

Close words: đầu óc (more casual, “brain/mind”), tâm trí (mind with more emotional nuance).
notes_md:
**trí** = mind, intellect — your ability to think, understand, remember, and reason.

It’s a noun and usually appears in set combinations rather than standing alone. Very common pairs: **trí tuệ** (intelligence), **trí nhớ** (memory), **lý trí** (reason, rational mind). It’s an abstract noun, so you don’t use classifiers with it.  

Close words: **đầu óc** (more casual, “brain/mind”), **tâm trí** (mind with more emotional nuance).

content.sentence: Cô ấy có một ___ thông minh.
